# Documentation PR Template

## Description

<!-- What docs were added/changed and why? -->

## Related Issues/Milestones

- Relates to #<issue_number> (optional)
- Milestone: <milestone_name_or_link> (optional)

## Changes

- [ ] README
- [ ] CONTRIBUTING
- [ ] SECURITY
- [ ] CODE_OF_CONDUCT
- [ ] Roadmap/Milestones
- [ ] Other: <file>

## Verification

- [ ] Markdown renders correctly
- [ ] Links are valid
- [ ] Examples compile/run if included

## Checklist

- [ ] Follows repository conventions
- [ ] No code behavior changed (or noted)
- [ ] CI green
